items.title: Rock Your Career: When Recruiters Treat Interviews Like Lottery Tickets
items.contentSnippet: The excerpt highlights two recruiting approaches: strategic, quality-driven methods and the ineffective flypaper method, which focuses on quantity over candidate suitability. The latter can harm candidates' reputations and trust with hiring managers.
